---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, file format, PII type, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
What would you like to see added or changed?

## Use Case
Describe your workflow and how this feature would help.

## Category
- [ ] New PII type / detector
- [ ] New file format support
- [ ] Provider-specific support (e.g. Microsoft, Snapchat, ISP data)
- [ ] CLI improvement
- [ ] Allowlist / filtering improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context
Any examples, screenshots, or references that help explain the request.
